DESC.TITLE: About me
DESC.NAME: José Alejandro Arias
DESC.DESCRIPCION_1: Cloud engineer focused on designing, implementing, and managing scalable infrastructure on AWS and Docker. Experienced in container orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure as code using Terraform and Ansible.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_2: Strong background in software development and system integration, with expertise in Java, TypeScript, and Python. Passionate about automating workflows and building resilient cloud-native applications.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_3: Proficient in Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) and DevOps practices including continuous integration, delivery, and monitoring. Advocate for open-source tools and infrastructure automation.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_4: Analytical, creative, and fast learner with a mentor mindset. Committed to staying current with emerging cloud technologies and best practices, always striving to deliver robust and efficient solutions.

PROYECTOS.SUBTITLE: Portfolio

PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_1: Interactive project generating real-time graphics of students, teachers, and administrators.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_2: Interactive clinic project managing appointments, doctors, patients, and user login and registration system.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_3: Backend project exposing REST services for a clinic project, using a MySQL database and Spring Boot.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_4: Web scraping project extracting data from Mercadolibre for any product and country.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_5: Brute force WiFi network attack project using Java and the aircrack-ng library.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_6: Project explaining creational, structural, and behavioral design patterns.
